items.name: Contributing Sensors With Local Tracknumbers
items.comment: List of Sensors contributing to the system track and providing a local track-number

items.name: SAC
items.comment: SAC of the sensor contributing to the track in the current update cycle.

items.name: SIC
items.comment: SIC of the sensor contributing to the track in the current update cycle.

items.name: TYP
items.comment:
0: No detection
1: Single PSR detection
2: Single SSR detection
3: SSR+PSR detection
4: Single Mode S All-Call
5: Single Mode S Roll-Call
6: Mode S All-Call + PSR
7: Mode S Roll-Call + PSR
8: ADS-B
9: WAM
Others: Reserved for future use

items.name: Spare
items.comment: Spare bits, set to 0

items.name: TYP
items.comment:
0: No detection
1: Single PSR detection
2: Single SSR detection
3: SSR+PSR detection
4: Single Mode S All-Call
5: Single Mode S Roll-Call
6: Mode S All-Call + PSR
7: Mode S Roll-Call + PSR
8: ADS-B
9: WAM
Others: Reserved for future use

items.name: LOCAL TRACK NUMBER
items.comment: local Track Number allocated by the sensor denominated by SAC/SIC

items.name: Contributing Sensors No Local Tracknumbers
items.comment: List of Sensors contributing to the system track and not providing a local track-number

items.name: SAC
items.comment: SAC of the sensor contributing to the track in the current update cycle.

items.name: SIC
items.comment: SIC of the sensor contributing to the track in the current update cycle.

items.name: TYP
items.comment:
0: No detection
1: Single PSR detection
2: Single SSR detection
3: SSR+PSR detection
4: Single Mode S All-Call
5: Single Mode S Roll-Call
6: Mode S All-Call + PSR
7: Mode S Roll-Call + PSR
8: ADS-B
9: WAM
Others: Reserved for future use

items.name: Spare
items.comment: Spare bits, set to 0

items.name: TYP
items.comment:
0: No detection
1: Single PSR detection
2: Single SSR detection
3: SSR+PSR detection
4: Single Mode S All-Call
5: Single Mode S Roll-Call
6: Mode S All-Call + PSR
7: Mode S Roll-Call + PSR
8: ADS-B
9: WAM
Others: Reserved for future use

items.name: Calculated Track Velocity Relative to System Reference Point
items.comment: Calculated track velocity expressed in Cartesian co-ordinates relative to the system reference point, in two’s complement form.

items.name: Supplementary Track Status
items.comment: Track status information to be transmitted in addition to the information available in data item I062/080 (Track Status).

items.name: FDR
items.comment:
Flight Data Retained
0: Flight plan data from active FDPS
1: Flight plan data retained from no longer active FDPS

items.name: LNAV#EP
items.comment:
LNAV Element Populated
0: LNAV not populated
1: LNAV populated

items.name: LNAV#VAL
items.comment:
LNAV Mode
0: LNAV Mode Engaged
1: LNAV Mode not Engaged

items.name: ATP#EP
items.comment:
ATP Element Populated
0: ATP not populated
1: ATP populated

items.name: ATP#VAL
items.comment:
24-Bit Address Type
0: 24-Bit ICAO address
1: 24-Bit Non-ICAO address
2: Surface vehicle address
3: Anonymous address
4: Fixed ADS-B Beacon
5-7: Reserved for future use

items.name: DAD#EP
items.comment:
DAD Element Populated
0: DAD not populated
1: DAD populated

items.name: DAD#VAL
items.comment:
Service wide Duplicate Address Status detected by the SDPS
0: duplicate address not present
1: duplicate address present

items.name: DUP#EP
items.comment:
DUP Element Populated
0: DUP not populated
1: DUP populated

items.name: DUP#VAL
items.comment:
Duplicate Address condition detected by a sensor
0: Duplicate Address Condition - Resolved
1: Duplicate Address Condition - Partly Resolved
2: Duplicate Address Condition - Not Resolved
3: Reserved for future use

items.name: CSX#EP
items.comment:
CSX Element Populated
0: CSX not populated
1: CSX populated

items.name: CSX#VAL
items.comment:
Extended Coasting Status
0: no extended coasting
1: extended coasting

items.name: TLI#EP
items.comment:
TLI Element Populated
0: TLI not populated
1: TLI populated

items.name: TLI#VAL
items.comment:
Transition Level Indication
0: at or above transition level
1: below transition level

items.name: TAI#EP
items.comment:
TAI Element Populated
0: TAI not populated
1: TAI populated

items.name: TAI#VAL
items.comment:
Transition Altitude Indication
0: above transition altitude
1: at or below transition altitude

items.name: ADS-B Version 3 Data
items.comment: Information transmitted by aircraft equipped with an ADS-B Version 3 System.

items.name: PS3
items.comment: Priority Status ADS-B Version 3

items.name: PS3#EP
items.comment:
Priority Status for Version 3 ADS-B Systems Populated
0: PS3 Element not populated
1: PS3 Element populated

items.name: PS3#VAL
items.comment:
Priority Status for Version 3 ADS-B Systems
0: No emergency / not reported
1: General emergency
2: UAS/RPAS - Lost Link
3: Minimum fuel
4: No communications
5: Unlawful interference
6: Aircraft in Distress Automatic Activation
7: Aircraft in Distress Manual Activation

items.name: AS
items.comment: Aircraft Status

items.name: RCE#EP
items.comment:
Reduced Capability Equipment Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: RCE#VAL
items.comment:
Reduced Capability Equipment
0: Not RCE
1: TABS
2: Reserved for future use
3: Other RCE

items.name: RRL#EP
items.comment:
Reply Rate Limiting Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: RRL#VAL
items.comment:
Reply Rate Limiting
0: Reply Rate Limiting is not active
1: Reply Rate Limiting is active

items.name: TPW#EP
items.comment:
Transmit Power Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: TPW#VAL
items.comment:
Transmit Power
0: Unavailable, Unknown, or less than 70 W
1: 70 W
2: 125 W
3: 200W

items.name: TSI#EP
items.comment:
Transponder Side Indication Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: TSI#VAL
items.comment:
Transponder Side Indication
0: Unknown
1: Transponder #1 (left/pilot side or single)
2: Transponder #2 (right/co-pilot side)
3: Transponder #3 (auxiliary or Back-up)

items.name: TAO#EP
items.comment:
Transponder Antenna Offset Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: RE
items.comment:
Range Exceeded
0: Value in defined range
1: Value exceeds defined range

items.name: TAO#VAL
items.comment: Transponder Antenna Offset Value (LSB = approx. 1.87m)

items.name: UAS
items.comment: UAS/RPAS Status

items.name: MUO#EP
items.comment:
Manned / Unmanned Operation Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: MUO#VAL
items.comment:
Manned / Unmanned Operation
0: Manned Operation
1: Unmanned Operation

items.name: DAA#EP
items.comment:
Detect and Avoid Capabilities Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: DAA#VAL
items.comment:
Detect and Avoid Capabilities
0: No RWC Capability
1: RWC/RA/OCM Capability
2: RWC/OCM Capability
3: Invalid ASTERIX Value

items.name: RWC#EP
items.comment:
Remain Well Clear Corrective Alert Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: RWC#VAL
items.comment:
Remain Well Clear Corrective Alert
0: RWC Corrective Alert not active
1: RWC Corrective Alert active

items.name: CASS
items.comment: Collision Avoidance System Status

items.name: SVH#EP
items.comment:
Sense Vertical & Horizontal Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: SVH#VAL
items.comment:
Sense Vertical & Horizontal
0: Vertical Only
1: Horizontal Only
2: Blended
3: Vertical Only or Horizontal Only per intruder

items.name: CATC#EP
items.comment:
CAS Type & Capability Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: CATC#VAL
items.comment:
CAS Type & Capability
0: Active CAS (TCAS II) or no CAS
1: Active CAS (not TCAS II)
2: Active CAS (not TCAS II) with OCM transmit capability
3: Active CAS of Junior Status
4: Passive CAS with 1030 TCAS Resolution Message receive capability
5: Passive CAS with only OCM receive capability
6: Reserved for future use
7: Reserved for future use

items.name: Miscellaneous Operational Items
items.comment: Miscellaneous items intended for operational purposes.

data_fields.name: LEN
data_fields.comment: Length of the Data Item in octets including the Length Indicator itself.

items.name: ATAD
items.comment: Age of Target Address

data_fields.name: ATAD
data_fields.comment: Age of Target Address (I062/380/SI#1) or Expired Target Address (I062/REF/MTI/EXADDR)

items.name: ATID
items.comment: Age of Target Identification

data_fields.name: ATID
data_fields.comment: Age of Target Identification (I062/380/SI#2) or Expired Target Identification (I062/REF/MTI/EXTID)

items.name: ADTNH
items.comment: Age of Downlinked True North Heading

data_fields.name: ADTNH
data_fields.comment: Age of Downlinked True North Heading (I062/REF/MOI/SI#14)

items.name: ADMNH
items.comment: Age of Downlinked Magnetic North Heading

data_fields.name: ADMNH
data_fields.comment: Age of Downlinked Magnetic North Heading (I062/REF/MOI/SI#15)

items.name: ADTNT
items.comment: Age of Downlinked True North Track Angle

data_fields.name: ADTNT
data_fields.comment: Age of Downlinked True North Track Angle (I062/REF/MOI/SI#16)

items.name: ADMNT
items.comment: Age of Downlinked Magnetic North Track Angle

data_fields.name: ADMNT
data_fields.comment: Age of Downlinked Magnetic North Track Angle (I062/REF/MOI/SI#17)

items.name: ASEPMIN
items.comment: Age of the System Calculated Separation Minimum

data_fields.name: ASEPMIN
data_fields.comment: Age of System Calculated Separation Minimum (I062/REF/MOI/SI#24)

items.name: AM5I
items.comment: Age of Mode 5 Interrogation

data_fields.name: AM5I
data_fields.comment: Age of Mode 5 Interrogation

items.name: AM5L2S
items.comment: Age of Mode 5 Level 2 Squitter

data_fields.name: AM5L2S
data_fields.comment: Age of Mode 5 Level 2 Squitter

items.name: ABDS
items.comment: BDS Register Data Age

items.name: ABDS
items.comment: BDS Register Data Age. BDS1: Comm B Data Buffer Store 1 Address, BDS2: Comm B Data Buffer Store 2 Address, ABDS: Age of BDS Register Data (I062/380/SI#25). LSB = 1/4 s

items.name: BDS1
items.comment: Comm B Data Buffer Store 1 Address

items.name: BDS2
items.comment: Comm B Data Buffer Store 2 Address

items.name: ABDS
items.comment: Age of BDS Register Data (I062/380/SI#25). LSB = 1/4 s

items.name: MPID
items.comment: Movement Plan ID

items.name: CHAR
items.comment: ASCII character

items.name: LS
items.comment: Leading Source

items.name: LSSAC
items.comment: System Area Code of the leading source

items.name: LSSIC
items.comment: System Identification Code of the leading source

items.name: LSSID#EP
items.comment:
LSSID Element Populated Bit
0: Element not populated
1: Element populated

items.name: LSSID#VAL
items.comment: Value of LSSID

items.name: LSQI
items.comment: Leading Source Quality Indication

data_fields.name: LSQUAL
data_fields.comment: Leading Source Quality Indication. LSB = 1 m^2*s

items.name: DTNH
items.comment: Downlinked True North Heading

items.name: DTNH
items.comment: Downlinked True North Heading. LSB = 360/2^13 degrees (approx. 0.044 degrees)

items.name: DMNH
items.comment: Downlinked Magnetic North Heading

items.name: DMNH
items.comment: Downlinked Magnetic North Heading. LSB = 360/2^13 degrees (approx. 0.044 degrees)

items.name: DTNT
items.comment: Downlinked True North Track Angle

items.name: DTNT
items.comment: Downlinked True North Track Angle. LSB = 360/2^13 degrees (approx. 0.044 degrees)

items.name: DMNT
items.comment: Downlinked Magnetic North Track Angle

items.name: DMNT
items.comment: Downlinked Magnetic North Track Angle. LSB = 360/2^13 degrees (approx. 0.044 degrees)

items.name: TBP
items.comment: Tracker Barometric Pressure

data_fields.name: TBP
data_fields.comment: Barometric pressure used by the tracker for this track. LSB = 0.05 hPa

items.name: ALTQCMFL
items.comment: Altitude from QNH Corrected Measured Flight Level

data_fields.name: ALTQCMFL
data_fields.comment: Altitude from QNH Corrected Measured Flight Level, in two's complement. LSB = 25 ft

items.name: CTBA
items.comment: Calculated Track Barometric Altitude

items.name: QNH
items.comment:
QNH correction applied
0: No QNH correction applied
1: QNH correction applied

items.name: CTBA
items.comment: Calculated Track Barometric Altitude, in two's complement form. LSB = 1/4 FL = 25 ft. Range: -1500 ft <= QCTBA <= 150000 ft

items.name: INPS
items.comment: Input to SDPS with Service ID and Local Track Number

items.name: SAC
items.comment: System Area Code of the input contributing to the track

items.name: SIC
items.comment: System Identification Code of the input contributing to the track

items.name: INPS_DATA
items.comment: SID, TIDN, IDN, AINP, and status fields

items.name: SID#EP
items.comment: SID Element Populated Bit. 0: Element not populated, 1: Element populated

items.name: SID#VAL
items.comment: Service Identification of the input contributing to the track in the current update cycle

items.name: TIDN
items.comment: Type of Identification number. 0: Information not available, 1: Local track number, 2: Address Type & Address Extension Number, 3-7: reserved

items.name: IDN
items.comment: Identification Number

items.name: AINP#EP
items.comment: AINP Element Populated Bit. 0: Element not populated, 1: Element populated

items.name: AINP#VAL
items.comment: Age of Input. LSB = 0.25 s

items.name: SSS
items.comment: SDPS Support Status of Input. 0: sensor measurement, 1: tracked data

items.name: INCS
items.comment: Independent Non-Cooperative support status of input. 0: no INCS support, 1: has INCS support

items.name: SSR
items.comment: SSR support status of input. 0: no SSR support, 1: has SSR support

items.name: MDS
items.comment: Mode-S radar support status of input. 0: no Mode-S radar support, 1: has Mode-S radar support

items.name: ADS
items.comment: ADS-B support status of input. 0: no ADS-B support, 1: has ADS-B support

items.name: MLT
items.comment: MLAT support status of input. 0: no MLAT support, 1: has MLAT support

items.name: Spare
items.comment: Spare bits, set to 0

items.name: FPVHR
items.comment: Fractional Part of Velocity (High Resolution)

items.name: DVX
items.comment: Fractional part of velocity in x direction, in two's complement. LSB = 1/2^10 m/s

items.name: DVY
items.comment: Fractional part of velocity in y direction, in two's complement. LSB = 1/2^10 m/s

items.name: SCT
items.comment: SUC Correlation Text

data_fields.name: SUCTXT
data_fields.comment: SUC correlation text consisting of 7 ASCII characters.

items.name: SCSM
items.comment: System Calculated Separation Minimum

data_fields.name: SEPMIN
data_fields.comment: System Calculated Separation Minimum. LSB = 0.1 NM

items.name: TCAT
items.comment: Target Category

items.name: TYP
items.comment:
Target type
0: Information not available
1: powered fixed / variable-sweep wing
2: rotocraft
3: glider / sailplane
4: lighter-than-air
5: ultralight / handglider / paraglider
6: parachutist / skydiver
7: surface vehicle
8-15: Reserved for future use

items.name: WGT
items.comment:
Target weight
0: Information not available
1: light aircraft <= 7000 kg
2: 7000 kg < medium aircraft < 136000 kg
3: 136000 kg <= heavy aircraft
4-15: Reserved for future use

items.name: PLT
items.comment:
Pilot status
0: Information not available
1: on-board piloted
2: remotely piloted
3: autonomous

items.name: Miscellaneous Technical Items
items.comment: Miscellaneous items for the addition of information to Category 062 mainly intended for technical purposes.

data_fields.name: LEN
data_fields.comment: Length of the Data Item in octets including the Length Indicator itself.

items.name: DATE
items.comment: Date of Track Information

data_fields.name: DATE
data_fields.comment: Current date of the track information in the form YYYYMMDD (BCD encoded)

items.name: TENTU
items.comment: Time to Expected Next Track Update

data_fields.name: TENTU
data_fields.comment: Time to expected next track update relative to the track information provided in I062/070. LSB = 1/128 s

items.name: IPMC
items.comment: Inverse Point Scale Factor and Meridian Convergence

items.name: IPNTSCL
items.comment: Inverse Point Scale Factor. LSB = 1/2^15

items.name: MERCVG
items.comment: Meridian Convergence, in two's complement. LSB = 180/2^15 degrees

items.name: IMP
items.comment: IMM Model Probability

items.name: IMM_MID
items.comment: IMM model identification

items.name: IMM_MPR
items.comment: IMM model probability. LSB = 0.5 per cent

items.name: IST
items.comment: IMM State

items.name: IMM_MID
items.comment: IMM model identification

items.name: LAT
items.comment: Latitude in WGS-84, in two's complement. LSB = 180/2^31 degrees

items.name: LON
items.comment: Longitude in WGS-84, in two's complement. LSB = 180/2^31 degrees

items.name: Vx
items.comment: Velocity in X direction, in two's complement. LSB = 0.25 m/s

items.name: Vy
items.comment: Velocity in Y direction, in two's complement. LSB = 0.25 m/s

items.name: Ax
items.comment: Acceleration in X direction, in two's complement. LSB = 0.25 m/s^2

items.name: Ay
items.comment: Acceleration in Y direction, in two's complement. LSB = 0.25 m/s^2

items.name: TTT
items.comment: Time of Track Termination

data_fields.name: TTT
data_fields.comment: Time of Track Termination, absolute time stamp since last midnight, expressed as UTC. LSB = 1/128 s

items.name: EXM3A
items.comment: Expired Mode 3/A Code

data_fields.name: EXM3A
data_fields.comment: Expired Mode 3/A Code after I062/060, Track Mode 3/A Code, has been removed from the track.

items.name: Spare
items.comment: Spare bits, set to 0

items.name: Mode-3/A reply
items.comment: Expired Mode 3/A Code in octal representation

items.name: EXADDR
items.comment: Expired Target Address

data_fields.name: EXADDR
data_fields.comment: Expired 24-bit target address after I062/380/SI#1, Target Address, has been removed from the track.

items.name: EXTID
items.comment: Expired Target Identification

data_fields.name: EXTID
data_fields.comment: Expired target identification after I062/380/SI#2, Target Identification, has been removed from the track. 8 characters in 6-bit ICAO encoding.

items.name: Target Identification
items.comment: Expired Target Identification

items.name: Generic Category 062 Data
items.comment: Placeholder for the addition of information to Category 062 even if all bits of the Item Indicator are allocated.
